name: Verified Building Visitor Entry Pass & Security Notification System

parameters.content:
### How It Works
This workflow automates visitor onboarding by validating each registration, 
generating a unique entry pass with QR code, and delivering it instantly. 
When a visitor submits their details through the webhook, the workflow checks 
for required fields, verifies the email using VerifiEmail, and routes invalid 
entries to a structured error response. For valid entries, it creates a unique 
pass ID, generates a QR code, builds a formatted HTML entry pass, and converts 
it into a downloadable PDF. The pass is emailed to the visitor and a 
confirmation notification is posted to Slack for the security/reception team.

### Setup Steps
1. Connect credentials: VerifiEmail, HTML-to-PDF service, Gmail, Slack.
2. Replace placeholder values:
   - Email sender name and company details
   - Slack channel ID (set to your #security or #reception channel)
   - Company logo URL in HTML template (optional)
3. Copy the webhook URL and integrate with your visitor registration form.
4. Test using a sample submission with a real email address.
5. Activate the workflow to begin processing visitor registrations.

### Use Cases
- Corporate office visitor management
- Co-working space day passes
- Secure facility access control
- Event/conference check-in
- Contractor/vendor entry tracking

## Visitor Registration & Email Verification
Receives visitor details and validates email deliverability before generating pass.

## Entry Pass Generation
Generates unique pass ID, QR code, and formatted PDF entry pass for the visitor.

## Pass Distribution & Security Alert
Delivers entry pass to visitor via email and notifies security/reception team through Slack.

## Error Handling
Returns structured error responses for invalid submissions.

parameters.html_content:
=

🏢 Building Entry Pass

{{ $('Create QR Code for Pass').item.json.visit_purpose }}

Visitor: {{ $('Create QR Code for Pass').item.json.visitor_name }}

Host: {{ $('Create QR Code for Pass').item.json.host_name }}

Visit Date: {{ $('Create QR Code for Pass').item.json.visit_date }}

Location: {{ $('Create QR Code for Pass').item.json.building_location }}

Pass ID: {{$('Create QR Code for Pass').item.json.badge_id}}

Generated: {{ $('Create QR Code for Pass').item.json.timestamp.split("T")[0] }} at {{ $('Create QR Code for Pass').item.json.timestamp.split("T")[1].split(".")[0].slice(0,5) }} UTC

Security Verified Entry Pass • Scan at Reception

parameters.subject: =Your Verified Building Entry Pass - {{ $('Generate Entry Pass ID').item.json.visit_date }}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "message": "Entry pass generated and sent!",
  "pass_id": "{{ $('Generate Entry Pass ID').item.json.badge_id }}",
  "visitor": "{{ $('Generate Entry Pass ID').item.json.visitor_name }}",
  "visit_date": "{{ $('Generate Entry Pass ID').item.json.visit_date }}"
}
